mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_identification WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_identification WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_identification WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_identification WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_identification ( equipment_name, equipment_type, location, install_date, applicable_categories, applicable_permits, status, assessor, assessment_date, linked_permits, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{equipmentName}, #{equipmentType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{applicableCategories,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{applicablePermits,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status}N'검토중', #{assessor,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{linkedPermits,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_identification SET equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, equipment_type = #{equipmentType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, install_date = #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, applicable_categories = #{applicableCategories,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, applicable_permits = #{applicablePermits,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status}, assessor = #{assessor,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, assessment_date = #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, linked_permits = #{linkedPermits,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_identification SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
